tickets.title: US001: Student 1
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to register using my .edu email,
so that only verified students can access the marketplace.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Users must use a valid .edu email
- Verification email is sent
- Unverified accounts cannot log in

tickets.title: US002: Student 2
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to scan textbook barcodes,
so that I can quickly create listings.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Camera can scan ISBN barcodes
- Book title autofills after scan
- Users can edit listing details

tickets.title: US003: Student 3
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to choose safe exchange zones,
so that I can meet buyers safely.

Acceptance Criteria:
- System displays approved safe zones
- Users must select a zone before chatting
- Selected zone is visible in the chat

tickets.title: US004: Admin/Staff
tickets.description:
As a Staff Member,
I want to manage approved safe exchange zones,
so that students can meet in secure locations.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Staff can add safe zones
- Staff can remove unsafe locations
- Changes update immediately for users

tickets.title: US005: Student 5
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to create auction listings,
so that I can sell items to the highest bidder.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can set auction duration
- Users can place bids
- Highest bid is displayed in real time

analysis.ambiguity1: The requirement "This needs to be exclusive" is vague because it does not clearly define who is allowed to access the platform or how eligibility should be verified.
analysis.ambiguity2: The requirement about "Safe Exchange Zones" is ambiguous because it does not specify how zones are selected, managed, or enforced during user meetups.
analysis.conflictSolution: The application should not process payments directly. Instead, users can complete payments using external services such as Venmo or cash, while the Student Union may charge listing or membership fees separately outside the payment transaction.
